blocking_issues: Pillow is required for readable image QA; run through uv or install pillow

deficiencies: Pillow is required for readable image QA; run through uv or install pillow
blocked_scenes.regeneration_prompt: Regenerate sc01 and directly fix these deficiencies: Pillow is required for readable image QA; run through uv or install pillow. Preserve approved character, PPE, equipment, site layout, story beat, and adjacent-scene continuity.

ralph_loop.instruction: Run RALPH loop for images only: regenerate blocked scene images, record new draft version, re-run validate_images, and repeat until all scores meet thresholds.
